banner.label: Hunter's Record · Architecture · Transmission · Precision
header.subtitle: Developer / Trainer ASP.NET & Angular & Symfony
snippets.transmission.title: Teaching & Knowledge Transfer
snippets.transmission.content: There is no better exercise than sharing knowledge: it tests our reasoning, clarifies our understanding of things and raises our level of excellence. A developer for 9 years, I place great importance on passing knowledge on to future developers.
snippets.stack.title: Stack & Technical Excellence
snippets.stack.content: My technology choices align with my ambitions. Angular and .NET represent modern, robust and scalable solutions. My goal remains constant: to build maintainable, solid and long-lasting applications for my clients.
snippets.architecture.title: Application Security & Architecture
snippets.architecture.content: Monolith, microservices, hexagonal architecture or serverless: every project has specific constraints and requirements. My role is not just to propose a solution, but to identify the most suitable, coherent and reliable one.
snippets.opensource.title: Open Source & Volunteering
snippets.opensource.content: More than a job, development is a passion I express through open source contributions and by mentoring young people through volunteer work. I see it as a concrete way to make technology useful and accessible.
snippets.quality.title: Quality & Responsibility
snippets.quality.content: I rely on rigorous code standards, active technical watch and a constant demand for quality. This discipline allows me to stay current, make better technical decisions and produce clean, reliable and responsible code.
